message.content:
@startuml
title UML Diagram: Class ComponentPosition in Context

skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam roundcorner 15
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam linetype ortho

skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor #F2F2F2
  BorderColor #666666
  FontColor black
}

skinparam note {
  BackgroundColor white
  BorderColor black
}

class "Components::\nComponentPosition" as ComponentPosition #FFD700 {
  value : Integer
}

class "DataDescription::\nDataStructure" as DataStructure
class "Components::\nDataStructureComponent" as DataStructureComponent
class "CollectionsPattern::\nPosition" as Position

note left of ComponentPosition
Hints
- Move the mouse cursor over a name to see more information.
- Click on a name to go to the corresponding page.
end note

DataStructure --> ComponentPosition : has
ComponentPosition --> DataStructureComponent : indexes
ComponentPosition ..> Position : «Refine»

@enduml
